HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF KWOK AU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. ATTY. DANIEL RILEY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF KWOK AU PRESENT IN COURT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. KWOK KAI AU HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R.
